content: Property ID: DUB-789, located at Palm Jumeirah, Dubai, UAE. Purchased on 2023-01-12 by Priya Mehta. Registration documents list her as sole owner. Payment of AED 2.2 million (₹4.2 crore) was made via wire transfer from HDFC Bank account ending 4456 (Priya Mehta). Source of funds: ₹4.2 crore received from NexaWave Ventures LLP on 2023-01-10. Priya Mehta’s employment records (Mumbai Municipal School) show annual income of ₹4.8 lakh. No other income source declared. No loan or gift declaration filed. NexaWave LLP has no declared business activity, no employees, no office, no bank account prior to 2022. Conclusion: Property was funded by illicit proceeds of VedaCorp fraud. Priya Mehta is a nominal owner.
